race.comment: HONEY PERFUME (6) just under a month between runs with a tenacious victory from the wide gate over 900m at Newcastle as favourite in the soft (7) going. Will appreciate the 3kg claim again and she gets a better set-up for this. Hard to stop. THE LITTLE GENERAL (15) gelding who returns from a six month break. Made good improvement last time in and looks ready to go after the two sound trials with the blinkers coming off. Will push forward and give plenty of cheek. MISS REBEL (7) handy mare resuming. Has placed previously first up and expect to see her stalk the speed today. Keep safe. LIGHT INFANTRY (9) is going nicely through the grades this time in and doesn't have to improve much after finishing third over 1100m at this track. Leading apprentice hops aboard and has genuine each-way prospects
